name: Small Bin Labels 3pk Gold - Brightroom™
description:
Label small bins, boxes, and more and elevate the look of your storage spaces with the 3-Pack of Small Bin Labels from Brightroom™. This gold-tone label pack is designed in a rectangular shape with a clear frame space for a label to easily identify the contents. Made of metal, this bin label pack is great for everyday use.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
